name: openoutreach_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the openoutreach capability.

prompts.name: lead_search_prompt
prompts.template: Find LinkedIn leads for a product targeting {target_market_description} with criteria: {search_criteria}
prompts.use_case: B2B sales teams automating lead generation and initial contact on LinkedIn.

prompts.name: outreach_message_prompt
prompts.template: Generate a personalized LinkedIn outreach message for a lead named {lead_name} working at {company_name}.
prompts.use_case: Recruiters sourcing candidates fitting specific profiles.
